name: Camish Brot
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
2. Divide the mixture into two low loaves and place them in a greased baking sheet.
3. Bake in a moderate oven for about 30-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Once baked, remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
5. Carefully cut each loaf in half-inch slices and transfer them to the cutting side up on the sheet.
6. Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes until golden brown, or until lightly crisp.
